description: Mock Berufsorientierte Aus- und Weiterbildungskosten 2025 (career-oriented further-education/training deduction) filing: a single filer in Uster who completed a career-oriented further-education programme in 2025, partially subsidized by the employer, whose self-borne cost exceeds the state-tax cap but not the federal-tax cap. Fabricated details, not a real person.
